summary: Label Correction Insights Dashboard (10-part spec) fully tested. All 21 backend API tests pass. All frontend features verified: navigation link, summary cards, 3 charts (Pie/Bar/Line), patterns table, vendor table with expansion, recommendations section with expansion, filter support via URL params, and Matching Debug panel integration.
critical_code_review_comments: All 6 new endpoints return proper response structures with required fields
Dashboard is read-only - POST/PUT/DELETE return 405 Method Not Allowed
Vendor detail expansion shows correction_rate, total_resolutions, pattern_stability, unstable_labels, label_remaps
Recommendations include both recommendation text and extraction_adjustment suggestions
Filter support working via URL query params (?vendor=, ?label=, ?ref=)
Matching Debug panel 'View Correction Insights' link passes vendor and label params
Charts render correctly using recharts library (Pie, Bar, Line)
seed_data_creation: Used existing data: 4 corrections for Cargo Modules LLC (PO→SHIPMENT) from iteration_32
context_for_next_testing_agent: Label Correction Insights Dashboard feature is fully implemented. Key test document: 80c7ab51-0cdb-48cc-b39c-b5d8a9c27c85 (Cargo Modules LLC). Dashboard shows: total_corrections=4, label_accuracy_rate=77.8%, vendors_impacted=1, top_mislabel=PO→SHIPMENT. Recommendation shows 'low' severity with freight vendor mislabeling text. Vendor expansion shows correction_rate=400%, total_resolutions=1, pattern_stability=stable. Matching Debug panel has 'View Correction Insights' link that navigates with filters.

GET /api/label-corrections/summary.evidence: Returns all 8 required fields: total_corrections=4, unique_reference_values, vendors_impacted=1, most_common_predicted_labels, most_common_actual_entities, label_accuracy_rate=77.8, corrections_last_7_days=4, corrections_last_30_days=4

GET /api/label-corrections/top-patterns.evidence: Returns patterns array with predicted_label, actual_entity_type, correct_label, count, percentage, vendors_impacted, vendor_names, example_references, avg_score. PO→SHIPMENT pattern found with count=4

GET /api/label-corrections/vendors.evidence: Returns array of vendor objects: Cargo Modules LLC with total_corrections=4, top_pattern='PO → SHIPMENT', unique_references=1, avg_score=0.78

GET /api/label-corrections/over-time.evidence: Returns array of {date, count} objects for time series chart

GET /api/label-corrections/recommendatio.evidence: Returns recommendation with severity='low', pattern='PO → SHIPMENT', count=4, recommendation text about freight vendors, extraction_adjustment suggestion

GET /api/label-corrections/vendor/{id}.evidence: Extended vendor insights with correction_rate, total_resolutions, label_frequency, entity_frequency, patterns, label_remaps, pattern_stability

Frontend navigation link.evidence: Label Insights link in sidebar with Target icon, navigates to /label-correction-insights

Frontend summary cards.evidence: 4 cards: Total Corrections (4), Label Accuracy (77.8%), Vendors Impacted (1), Top Mislabel (PO → SHIPMENT)

Frontend 3 charts.evidence: Mislabel by Label Type (Pie), Actual Entity Distribution (Bar), Corrections Over Time (Line) - all using recharts

Frontend recommendations section.evidence: Expandable recommendations with severity badge, pattern, count, recommendation text, and extraction_adjustment in violet box

Frontend patterns table.evidence: Table with Predicted Label, Actual Entity, Count, %, Vendors, Example References, Avg Score columns

Frontend vendor table with expansion.evidence: Clickable rows expand to show correction_rate, total_resolutions, stability badge, unstable_labels, patterns, label_remaps

Frontend filter support.evidence: Active Filters section displayed when URL has ?vendor= or ?label= params, with Clear button

Matching Debug panel integration.evidence: 'View Correction Insights' link at bottom of Matching Debug panel, navigates to /label-correction-insights with vendor and label query params

Read-only enforcement.evidence: POST/PUT/DELETE requests to dashboard endpoints return 405 Method Not Allowed

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are live. Test data from previous iteration_32 (4 corrections from Cargo Modules LLC document)
